title: HE PROMISED CAMPUS FREE SPEECH. EO 13899 SAID NO.
title_alt: THE EXECUTIVE ORDER THAT QUIETLY NARROWED CAMPUS SPEECH
BROKEN: CAMPUS FREE SPEECH vs EO 13899
BROKEN: Campus Speech vs EO 13899 | SEALED
description:
He promised to protect campus speech on the trail — but in December 2019 he signed Executive Order 13899, pushing schools toward federal rules on criticism of Israel.

Trail talk: open debate. Receipt: EO 13899 (Dec 11, 2019) applied the IHRA antisemitism definition to Title VI schools. The book grades it BROKEN.

Full 145-promise audit: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shorts&utm_campaign=campus-eo

#politics #campus #trump #shorts #factcheck
